greetings.opening: Marhba bik! 🌟 CareerBridge AI ghadi ysa3dek t9da lmoussira dyalek.
greetings.family_message: Lwalidine l-kram, had lbramij mbniya 3la waqe3 suq l-khidma f-lmaghrib. Ghadi nkounouwa m3akom khatwa khatwa.
greetings.encouragement: Mabrouk 3la had lkhtar! L-mostaqbal dyalek mazal f-yadik.

domain_intros.informatique_ia: IA w Informatique hia lmida9 dial lmostaqbal! F-lmaghrib, had lqita3 kankhdem b-zouj ydih.
domain_intros.data_science: Data Science, makaynsh 7ad kaydfa3 bla data. Nta gh9adi tkoun lmouti3 dial had lmaghrib.
domain_intros.medecine: Tib howa lkhidma l-insaniya par excellence. Lmaghrib mhdag l-atibba bzzaf.
domain_intros.energies_renouvelables: Lmaghrib ghadi ikoun 52% energie renouvelable 2030. Had lqita3 kay7tag l-nas zin 3liha.
domain_intros.agriculture_agritech: Fellaha moderniya m3a technologia - Plan Maroc Vert II kayfta7 bab kebir.
domain_intros.finance_banque: Finance w FinTech - l-banks dyalna kayt7awlu. FinTech hia lfursa.
domain_intros.genie_civil: Génie Civil mazal m7tag minu. Walakin khas t-specialise f-BIM aw construction durable.
domain_intros.tourisme_hotellerie: Siyaha katrja3 walakin khas t-specialise f-luxe aw eco-tourisme.

motivational_phrases: Kul nhar tatqaddam khatwa zgira, ghadi twsel l-lbaid.
L-mostaqbal dyalek mashi maktub - nta lli ghadi taktbu.
F-lmaghrib dyal had lqarn, li 3anduhu l-3ilm 3anduhu l-quwwa.
L-echec mashi nihaya - hiya dars kayzid-lak l-khibra.
Sber 3la t3alum, l-jaza kay-ji m3a l-waqt.

plan_b_messages.intro: Ila ma-9dirsh tda9oul lmadrasa lli bghiti, kayn plan B - machi nihaya!
plan_b_messages.online_learning: Coursera, edX, YouTube - 3andek data scientist Moroccan lli t3allam b-l-baraka w daba kankhdem f-Google.
plan_b_messages.bootcamp: Coding bootcamps f-Casablanca w Rabat - 6 shhar w katlqa khidma.
plan_b_messages.entrepreneurship: Startup f-lmaghrib - Maroc Startup Act kaysa3d.
plan_b_messages.encouragement: L-muhim mashi win dkhoul, l-muhim wacha ta3llam w wachno kadir biha.

rejection_soften.saturated_domain: Smahli nqoulek l-haqiqa bsa7a - had lqita3 fih bzzaf d-lkhrejin. Walakin kayn plan B mizyan.
rejection_soften.low_salary: L-ma3ash mashi ghali bzzaf, walakin ila 3andek passion w skills, ghadi tatqaddam.
rejection_soften.long_studies: 7 snin medecine - kabira, walakin l-jaza kabir. Wdak l-waqt kaymchi b-sur3a.

school_specific.UM6P: UM6P f-Ben Guerir - université dial lmostaqbal. Bursa mawjuda l-lmoti9in.
school_specific.EHTP: EHTP f-Casablanca - wa7da men a7san lcoles d-ingenierie f-lmaghrib w lmaghrib l-arabi.
school_specific.ENSET: ENSET Mohammedia - publique w 3andha ism mezyan f-suq l-khidma.
school_specific.IAV: IAV Hassan II - qimma d-ingenierie zira3iya f-lmaghrib.
school_specific.FMPC: Faculte de Medecine Casablanca - khrejat a7san atibba f-lmaghrib.
